Análisis de Caudal de Video en Sistemas de Videovigilancia

Juan Ignacio Cavelli, Ana Menoni, Agustina Pena

Análisis Exploratorio

library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)

Exploración inicial de los datos

# Cargar datos
data <- read.csv("datos_telematica_videovigilancia.csv")

cat("Primeras filas del dataset:\n")
## Primeras filas del dataset:
kable(head(data))
camaras_activas resolucion_video cuadros_por_segundo compresion_h265_crf perdida_paquetes_pct capacidad_uplink_mbps uso_cpu_nvr_pct complejidad_escena caudal_video_mbps
40 1080p 60 22.3 3.44 183.1 38.1 alta 119.4
40 720p 30 25.5 2.20 198.9 51.2 alta 89.2
26 1080p 25 24.6 3.60 92.3 11.7 media 53.4
41 1440p 15 28.3 3.24 46.7 75.4 alta 71.8
38 720p 60 26.0 1.07 247.3 62.4 media 114.3
41 1080p 15 24.4 3.96 222.4 37.1 baja 71.3 
cat("\nEstructura de los datos:\n")
## 
## Estructura de los datos:
glimpse(data)
## Rows: 200
## Columns: 9
## $ camaras_activas       <int> 40, 40, 26, 41, 38, 41, 29, 30, 20, 38, 7, 10, 4…
## $ resolucion_video      <chr> "1080p", "720p", "1080p", "1440p", "720p", "1080…
## $ cuadros_por_segundo   <int> 60, 30, 25, 15, 60, 15, 25, 30, 25, 25, 60, 30, …
## $ compresion_h265_crf   <dbl> 22.3, 25.5, 24.6, 28.3, 26.0, 24.4, 18.2, 22.2, …
## $ perdida_paquetes_pct  <dbl> 3.44, 2.20, 3.60, 3.24, 1.07, 3.96, 1.95, 3.01, …
## $ capacidad_uplink_mbps <dbl> 183.1, 198.9, 92.3, 46.7, 247.3, 222.4, 98.6, 20…
## $ uso_cpu_nvr_pct       <dbl> 38.1, 51.2, 11.7, 75.4, 62.4, 37.1, 10.8, 65.0, …
## $ complejidad_escena    <chr> "alta", "alta", "media", "alta", "media", "baja"…
## $ caudal_video_mbps     <dbl> 119.4, 89.2, 53.4, 71.8, 114.3, 71.3, 95.4, 77.3…
cat("\nResumen estadístico:\n")
## 
## Resumen estadístico:
summary(data)
##  camaras_activas resolucion_video   cuadros_por_segundo compresion_h265_crf
##  Min.   : 4.00   Length:200         Min.   :15.00       Min.   :18.10      
##  1st Qu.:13.75   Class :character   1st Qu.:25.00       1st Qu.:22.30      
##  Median :24.50   Mode  :character   Median :30.00       Median :26.15      
##  Mean   :24.11                      Mean   :28.52       Mean   :26.46      
##  3rd Qu.:35.00                      3rd Qu.:30.00       3rd Qu.:30.62      
##  Max.   :41.00                      Max.   :60.00       Max.   :35.90      
##  perdida_paquetes_pct capacidad_uplink_mbps uso_cpu_nvr_pct complejidad_escena
##  Min.   :0.020        Min.   : 20.80        Min.   :10.10   Length:200        
##  1st Qu.:0.940        1st Qu.: 83.95        1st Qu.:30.52   Class :character  
##  Median :1.960        Median :156.30        Median :52.05   Mode  :character  
##  Mean   :1.983        Mean   :153.82        Mean   :49.84                     
##  3rd Qu.:3.000        3rd Qu.:218.65        3rd Qu.:68.00                     
##  Max.   :3.980        Max.   :299.90        Max.   :88.00                     
##  caudal_video_mbps
##  Min.   : 12.00   
##  1st Qu.: 55.08   
##  Median : 73.50   
##  Mean   : 72.12   
##  3rd Qu.: 88.22   
##  Max.   :137.40

Distribución de la variable respuesta

ggplot(data, aes(x = caudal_video_mbps)) +
  geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 25,
                 fill = "#2980b9", color = "white", alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_density(color = "#e74c3c", linewidth = 1) +
  labs(title = "Distribución del caudal agregado de video",
       x = "Caudal (Mbps)", y = "Densidad") +
  theme_minimal()

Preparación de los datos

data$resolucion_video   <- factor(data$resolucion_video, 
                                   levels = c("720p", "1080p", "1440p"), 
                                   ordered = TRUE)

data$complejidad_escena <- factor(data$complejidad_escena, 
                                   levels = c("baja", "media", "alta"), 
                                   ordered = TRUE)

Relación entre predictores y caudal

data %>%
  select(camaras_activas, cuadros_por_segundo, compresion_h265_crf,
         perdida_paquetes_pct, capacidad_uplink_mbps, uso_cpu_nvr_pct,
         caudal_video_mbps) %>%
  pivot_longer(-caudal_video_mbps, names_to = "variable", values_to = "valor") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = valor, y = caudal_video_mbps)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2980b9", size = 1.5) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "#e74c3c", se = FALSE) +
  facet_wrap(~ variable, scales = "free_x", ncol = 2) +
  labs(title = "Caudal vs predictores numéricos",
       x = "", y = "Caudal (Mbps)") +
  theme_minimal()
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Variables categóricas vs caudal

p1 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = resolucion_video, y = caudal_video_mbps,
                        fill = resolucion_video)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Caudal por resolución", x = "", y = "Caudal (Mbps)") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none")

p2 <- ggplot(data, aes(x = complejidad_escena, y = caudal_video_mbps,
                        fill = complejidad_escena)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(title = "Caudal por complejidad", x = "", y = "Caudal (Mbps)") +
  theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "none")

gridExtra::grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)

Correlaciones entre variables numéricas

data %>%
  select(where(is.numeric)) %>%
  cor() %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("var1") %>%
  pivot_longer(-var1, names_to = "var2", values_to = "correlacion") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = var1, y = var2, fill = correlacion)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white") +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(correlacion, 2)), size = 3) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#e74c3c", mid = "white", high = "#2980b9",
                       midpoint = 0, limits = c(-1, 1)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = rev) +
  labs(title = "Matriz de correlación", x = "", y = "", fill = "r") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
